response.justification: Bogdan possesses exceptional technical skills, including extensive experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and AWS, which align perfectly with the required tech stack. However, with nearly two decades of experience and current roles at the Staff and Senior level, he is vastly overqualified for this Junior/Mid-level (entry-level) position. Additionally, his current location in Bangalore may conflict with the high on-site presence requirement, and there is a very high risk of salary mismatch and rapid role dissatisfaction.
strengths: Extensive expertise in the required tech stack, including TypeScript, React, Node.js, and SQL databases.
Strong background in clean software architecture, TDD, and modern CI/CD practices.
Possesses several nice-to-have qualifications, including AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM integration experience.
concerns: Massively overqualified for an entry-level position, having held Staff and Senior titles for over a decade.
Current location in Bangalore may conflict with the high on-site presence requirement depending on the office location.
High risk of salary mismatch and job dissatisfaction given the junior scope and responsibilities of the role.
